## Summary

What this PR does, in 1–3 sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code hygiene

## Security impact

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Changes security-relevant behavior, described here:

> _Describe security-relevant changes, if any._

## Testing

How was this tested? Include manual reproduction steps if no automated test exists yet.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guide for its language
- [ ] Tests added or updated (when applicable)
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
- [ ] No personal information, real names, real emails, or secrets in the diff
- [ ] Reviewed for `console.log` / `println!` / `dbg!` style debug leftovers
- [ ] PR title is descriptive

## For security-relevant changes

- [ ] No new attack surface added without justification
- [ ] No dependency on an unmaintained or unaudited package
- [ ] Cryptographic operations use vetted libraries, not custom code
- [ ] Reviewer with security context tagged (maintainer to assign)
